heading: Definition
label: 152101 Definition
text: For purposes of this chapter, “State” includes the District of Columbia and the territories and possessions of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15210136:4113., , .Nov. 14, 1988Pub. L. 100–655, § 114102 Stat. 3852The words “the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico” are omitted as included in “the territories and possessions of the United States”.
